Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x0894 "AlternativeFormats\PRGs\Uncrunched\Wombles, The.prg,0x0400,0x00EC" -Di_irq_exit=0 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 lda #$34 sta $01 jsr $d000 lda #$35 sta $01 jsr $5500 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Wombles, The.prg"
Metadata.Notes: Added a routine at $5500 to display the loading screen (the colour RAM is loaded for this to display correctly) and wait for any key or the fire button on either joystick to enter the game.
